title: Sepulchral Ruby
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Sepulchral Ruby''' was a motif used by [[Utai/Legends|Utai]] on [[Porax-38 starfighter|P-38 fighters]]. It originated from early [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] settlements on [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]] circa [[57,000 BBY/Legends|57,000 years]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Because of this great distance in [[Time/Legends|time]], its meaning was long forgotten.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2005-04-02 -->''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith Incredible Cross-Sections]]''
